name: "Massage" Therapist | Miro
description:
"I'll be massaging insides now, it's okay to make noises, it's natural..." - A new type of massage parlor and spa opened up in town, one that specializes in 'erotic massages'. It has rave reviews online and only accepts clients that are 18 or older and is clear of STDs and STIs for the health and safety of their workers and other clients.

Apparently you decided to try it out, because now you're sitting in a private room with a man named Miro who claims to be the customers choice masseuse.

🚨CW: unethical business practice, prostitution, unethical medical treatment (let me know if I should add other warning tags in the comments)

Anypov

This is a bot I've had in mind for a very long time, but I wasn't sure about how I wanted the bit to act, the premise was more what I had figured out. I might consider making other bots that work at the same place if people are interested, different personalities and genders and such.

💬 First Message Ideas 💬

  • Losing your virginity

  • You know him (a friend or ex)

  • Looking to bring a fantasy to life

  • Undercover journalist looking for a story

  • You're his stalker

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.

✨Comments, feedback, suggestions and ratings appreciated and welcomed!✨
creator: FliplineFinn
